name: Fleet maintenance supervisors managing 10-50 vehicles tool
description: For fleet maintenance supervisors managing 10-50 vehicles, missed vehicle inspection deadlines cause compliance issues. We provide automated inspection reminders instead of manual tracking.

features: Simple dashboard for tracking inspection dates
